creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
>I think we're spending here time on something not fixable, since the MBR/EBR or GPT on ada0 is problematic and I need to fix it

I think the check is bogus and we are improperly rejecting things.

Did you ever upload the first MB or so of the disk? I think the EBR code is getting the number of valid partitions wrong so bogusly checking 33...
